message:
fix(tui): add severity-styled summary text and readable source badges to timeline (br-1xt0m.1.10.4)

Timeline event rows now apply severity-aware styling: error/warn summaries
inherit bold red/amber coloring, trace events are dimmed. Source badges
use readable mixed-case ("Tool", "Mail", "Resv", "Life") instead of
cryptic all-caps ("TOOL", "RESV", "LIFE"). Kind label and summary are
split into separate styled spans. Filter tags use compact_label() instead
of Debug format.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
